summary: R2 functional QA accepts commit c79ef7e3a9f20180f22b96e1c6303ca0fd11a2b6. The prior P1 M7 accepted-save boundary bypass is fixed: acceptedSaveManifests rejects M7 and any non-M1-through-M6 entry, candidateContentManifests is constrained to M7 beta candidates, direct classification ignores M7 accepted-save entries, and the high-level validator no longer returns compatible for the reproduced bypass.

tests_run.result: No output before writing the QA R2 handoff; tracked worktree was clean.

tests_run.command: git branch --show-current; git rev-parse HEAD; git rev-parse c79ef7e3
tests_run.result: Branch codex/m7-save-migration-cloud-boundaries; HEAD 1f7a12075d9e72f7e819a15dee4683229ca7feb1; R2 commit c79ef7e3a9f20180f22b96e1c6303ca0fd11a2b6.
Task registry listed successfully; M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 is REVIEW.
M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 is the listed ready task.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 and project/goal-mode-state.json
tests_run.result: TASK_SHAPE_OK M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 REVIEW route_to=security_reviewer human_gate_required=false; GOAL_HUMAN_GATE_REQUIRED=false active_gate_task_id=null.
No task-forbidden path matched. Diff is limited to allowed save-format, tests, and project process/message/state paths.

tests_run.command: Select-String scan for fetch/XMLHttpRequest/WebSocket/ipcRenderer/openExternal/eval/http/https/account/cloud/remote/telemetry surfaces in reviewed save/protocol files
tests_run.result: Only negative protocol probe literals were found for simulation.account.login, simulation.cloud-save-sync, simulation.remote-save-collect, and simulation.telemetry.upload.

tests_run.command: node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module one-off QA P1 bypass repro against R2 code
tests_run.result: Prior bypass no longer returns compatible: boundary validation rejects acceptedSaveManifests[6].milestone=M7, direct classification returns beta-content-lock-candidate, and validateM7SaveMigrationCandidateV1 returns human-gate-required.

tests_run.command: node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module one-off invalid candidate milestone probe
tests_run.result: candidateContentManifests[0].milestone=M6 is rejected with invalid-boundary and missing M7 candidate evidence.
Vitest passed: 3 test files, 28 tests, including the QA-reproduced bypass regression.
Architecture boundaries passed; deterministic Node/Worker save-load, M4, M5, and M6 hashes matched; root Vitest passed 42 files and 352 tests; web Vitest passed 1 file and 9 tests.
Electron security preferences passed; preload exposes only monsoonDesktop; renderer navigation restricted; allowed IPC channels remain desktop:getRuntimeInfo and desktop:setFullscreen.
Prettier format check, ESLint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary check passed.

decisions: ACCEPT: acceptedSaveManifests is constrained to M1-M6 in both boundary validation and direct classification.
ACCEPT: candidateContentManifests is constrained to M7 beta-content-lock-candidate entries and remains human-gate-required.
ACCEPT: the prior QA P1 bypass is covered by an automated regression and by an independent one-off repro rerun.

ACCEPT: no Human Gate is active now; cloud-save enablement, irreversible migration, account-backed persistence, network persistence, telemetry/accounts/secrets, and frozen save/platform decisions remain Human Gates.
risks: This acceptance is functional QA for the R2 boundary fix. It is not formal M7 content lock acceptance, cloud-save approval, irreversible migration approval, release readiness, or a Human Gate decision.
Security ACCEPT was issued before R2. R2 narrows validation/classification behavior and does not add network, account, provider, telemetry, secret, IPC, or cloud implementation surfaces.
requested_action: Proceed with lead orchestration and integration gates for M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001.
